## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17, Firefox 115]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- **Package manager**: [e.g. pnpm 9.0.0]
- **Sheet Ninja version**: [e.g. v2.0.0]

## 📝 Logs

<details>
<summary>Console logs</summary>

```
Paste your console logs here
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Server logs (if applicable)</summary>

```
Paste your server logs here
```

</details>

## 🔧 Configuration

<details>
<summary>Environment variables (remove sensitive data)</summary>

```env
DATABASE_URL="postgresql://..."
NEXTAUTH_URL="http://localhost:3000"
# Add other relevant config (WITHOUT sensitive values)
```

</details>

## 🔍 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. For example:
- Does this happen consistently or intermittently?
- Did this work before? If so, what changed?
- Are there any workarounds?

## 🎯 Possible Solution

If you have any ideas on how to fix this, please share!

**Note**: Please search existing issues before creating a new one to avoid duplicates.
